Itemized  ·  Procedures  ·  Comprehensive metabolic panel  ·  California

Comprehensive metabolic panel cost in California.

Cash-pay range for comprehensive metabolic panel across 48 hospitals in California: $10 to $1,351. CPT code 80053. Pulled from each hospital's federally-mandated price transparency file.

Cheapest in California
$10
Saint Francis Medical Center
Lynwood, CA
vs.
Most expensive in California
$1,351
Torrance Memorial Medical Center
Torrance, CA

Data sources: CMS Hospital Price Transparency rule (45 CFR 180.50). CMS Hospital Care Compare (xubh-q36u). CMS HCAHPS patient survey (dgck-syfz). Last refresh: 2026-04-27.
A consumer reading of CMS-mandated MRF data. Not medical or financial advice. Itemized · itemized.health
